_comment: Per-module metadata used by src/components/Modules/ModuleOverview.tsx. Edit freely — no rebuild required after a static-file change; just redeploy. Each entry has: tagline (1 line), description (2-3 sentences), keyFeatures (3-5 bullets), who (audience description), privilege/anyPrivilege (gate identity — used to detect upsell branch), ctaEmail (the address pre-filled when a user clicks 'Talk to your admin').

quiz.label: Quiz
quiz.tagline: Knowledge checks, auto-quiz pools, and topic-wise mastery tracking.
quiz.description: Quiz lets editors build assessments and learners take them. Eight question types — including multi-choice, hotspot, drag-and-drop, fill-in-the-blank, and matching — combine into manual or auto-generated quizzes. Managers track team performance through topic-, country-, and learner-wise analytics.
keyFeatures: 8 question types incl. drag-drop and hotspot
Auto-quiz pools with randomised question selection
quiz.who: Authored by Editors. Taken by all Learners. Managers see reportee scores.

smartpath.label: SmartPath
smartpath.tagline: Curated learning journeys that combine quizzes, content, coaching, and live sessions.
smartpath.description: SmartPath lets editors stitch together quizzes, SmartFeed content, video coachings, surveys, and instructor-led learning sessions into a single ordered journey. Learners follow the path at their own pace; managers track completion and segment-wise time-on-task.
keyFeatures: Mix quizzes, content, coachings, surveys, and live sessions
Assign by user, group, division, or metatag
smartpath.who: Authored by Editors. Followed by Learners. Managers track reportee progress.

smartfeed.label: SmartFeed
smartfeed.tagline: Bite-sized video and article content delivered to the right audience.
smartfeed.description: SmartFeed is your micro-learning content engine. Editors publish short videos, articles, and PPT decks; learners watch, like, and comment on a personalised feed. Use it for product updates, sales tips, and ongoing reinforcement between formal training.
smartfeed.who: Authored by Editors. Consumed by all Learners. Managers see team engagement.

video-coaching.label: Video Coaching
video-coaching.tagline: Submit a recorded pitch, get scored by managers against a rubric.
video-coaching.description: Video Coaching lets learners record themselves performing a sales pitch, product demo, or skill check; managers review the recording against a competency rubric and leave structured feedback. Audio-only and screen-recording variants are supported for non-video scenarios.
video-coaching.who: Submitted by Learners. Reviewed by Managers. Configured by Editors.

ai-coaching.label: AI Coaching
ai-coaching.tagline: Practice real-world conversations against an AI character that scores you.
ai-coaching.description: AI Coaching is a roleplay simulator. Editors configure an AI character — its persona, the scenario, and the skill rubric — and learners practice conversations until they feel ready for the real thing. The AI scores each attempt against the rubric and gives structured feedback. One-way and two-way conversation modes are supported.
keyFeatures: AI characters with custom personas and scenarios
ai-coaching.who: Practised by Learners. Configured by Editors. Reviewed by Managers.

field-coaching.label: Field Coaching
field-coaching.tagline: Structured ride-along coaching with competency-based scoring.
field-coaching.description: Field Coaching is for in-person coaching moments — sales ride-alongs, store walks, on-floor observations. Editors set the competencies and the rubric; managers fill them out on mobile during or right after the visit. The mobile-first design works offline and syncs when the manager reconnects.
keyFeatures: Mobile-first form designed for in-the-field use
Offline support with sync on reconnect
Trend reports by reportee and by competency
field-coaching.who: Conducted by Managers in the field. Configured by Editors.

survey.label: Survey
survey.tagline: Collect structured feedback with templates, sections, and response analytics.
survey.description: Survey lets editors design feedback instruments — from quick pulse checks to full 360s — with reusable templates, sectioned questionnaires, and a range of question types. Responses are auto-analysed with response-rate, distribution, and trend charts.
survey.who: Designed by Editors. Responded to by all Learners.

knowledge-hub.label: Knowledge Hub
knowledge-hub.tagline: A searchable library of reference content for in-the-moment lookup.
knowledge-hub.description: Knowledge Hub (KHub) is the always-on reference shelf — product datasheets, FAQs, objection handlers, competitor briefs. Editors organise content into folders; learners search and read on the SmartWinnr app. KHub items can also be cited from coaching feedback and AI responses.
keyFeatures: Full-text search from the mobile app
Recent + trending sections on the home tab
Reusable from coaching feedback and AI Coaching
knowledge-hub.who: Curated by Editors. Searched by all Learners.

forms.label: Forms
forms.tagline: Custom data-collection forms with manager approval workflows.
forms.description: Forms let editors build short data-capture experiences — service requests, expense reports, customer-visit logs, anything that needs a structured response. Submissions can require manager approval before they're final.
keyFeatures: Build custom forms with mixed input types
Submit from the left menu or the chat
Edit submissions from the manager view
forms.who: Submitted by all Learners. Designed by Editors. Approved by Managers.

kpi-gamification.label: KPI & Gamification
kpi-gamification.tagline: Scorecards, competitions, achievements, and engagement leaderboards.
kpi-gamification.description: Track real-world performance with KPI scorecards and drive engagement through competitions, badges, and leaderboards. Editors map external data into KPIs; managers see team standings; learners chase their score.
keyFeatures: KPI scorecards with custom field mapping
kpi-gamification.who: Configured by Editors. Tracked by Managers. Played by all Learners.

notifications.label: Notifications & Chat
notifications.tagline: Custom, scheduled, and triggered notifications plus in-app chat.
notifications.description: Reach your learners with templated and triggered notifications, scheduled drip campaigns, and a 1:1 / group chat for support. Editors and admins design the templates and delivery rules; learners receive them in-app and via push.
keyFeatures: Triggered notifications from quiz, coaching, KPI events
notifications.who: Designed by Editors and OrgAdmins. Received by all Learners.

cross-module.label: Cross-Module Features
cross-module.tagline: Behaviour that spans multiple modules — query, app updates, navigation.
cross-module.description: Cross-module features are pieces of SmartWinnr that aren't tied to one module. The QResolve query system, mobile app updates, SCORM course access, and other glue behaviours live here. Every role uses at least some of these.
keyFeatures: QResolve — ask the support team a question
SCORM course access from the app
Mobile app updates from the web view
Shared content across competitions and quizzes
cross-module.who: Used by everyone — Learners, Managers, Editors, Admins.
